title: Styled Boss Bar API
body:
# Styled Boss Bar API

Design your Styled Boss Bar!

## What is this mod for?

Minecraft's boss bar api is too sealed to design a boss bar in custom style.

Use this api, modders can create style with styles made by themselves.

## What do you need to do?

- If you are a player, just install this mod if you use any mod that requires.
- If you are a developer, you can visit the source github page to know how to use.
